channel.title: Tetradentate Schiff base; trinuclear copper complex; X-ray study; DFTcalculation on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Tetradentate Schiff base; trinuclear copper complex; X-ray study; DFTcalculation on LMI

item.title: Design of end-on cyanato bridged trinuclear Cu(II) Schiff base complexwith salen type Schiff base ligand: synthesis, structural investigationand DFT study
